goal: Build a 3-stage domain-randomization curriculum for a Franka pick-place training run. Stage 1 (fixed): no DR — baseline scene; Stage 2 (lighting+color): add_domain_randomizer for light intensity and cube color; Stage 3 (full): add texture + pose jitter on top. analyze_randomization validates each stage's distribution; preview_dr confirms visual coverage before committing; clone_envs(16) instances the Stage-3 env for PPO; launch_training starts the curriculum run; checkpoint_training saves a stage-transition snapshot. SUCCESS: analyze_randomization reports std > 0 on all active axes for Stage 3 AND checkpoint saved without error. Exercises suggest_dr_ranges, apply_dr_preset, add_domain_randomizer, analyze_randomization, preview_dr, clone_envs, create_isaaclab_env, launch_training, checkpoint_training. Realizes Phase 9 yrkesroll #10 (sim-to-real / RL engineer persona).
thoughts: Pattern is rl-train, NOT pick_place. The scene build is minimal (skeleton + robot + bin + cube) — the key workflow is the DR curriculum authoring loop, not pick-place execution.

3-stage curriculum rationale: Stage 1 establishes a clean baseline. Stage 2 adds photometric DR (light intensity + cube color) — low variance, helps policy generalize to lighting changes. Stage 3 adds object-pose jitter + texture randomization — high variance, the target policy distribution for deployment.

suggest_dr_ranges called FIRST with task_type='pick_and_place' and robot='Franka Panda'. Returns safe default ranges (e.g. light intensity 400-2000 lux, color min/max). These are used as starting points before apply_dr_preset tightens them to the 'indoor_industrial' preset.

apply_dr_preset('indoor_industrial') returns a parameter dict consistent with clean-room / factory floor photometry. We selectively override light intensity range from the preset since our DomeLight is synthetic.

add_domain_randomizer is called 3 times across the 3 stages — each call adds a new randomizer node to the Replicator graph. Stage 3 includes target='/World/DomeLight' (lighting) + '/World/Cube_.*' (color+texture) + '/World/Cube_.*' (pose jitter). Randomizer types: 'lighting', 'color', 'texture', 'pose'.
analyze_randomization(num_samples=30) validates that all active axes have std > 0. If any axis collapses (std ~ 0), the canonical reports it as a failure mode and aborts before clone_envs.
preview_dr(num_samples=9) generates a 3x3 image grid so the human operator can visually sanity-check the Stage-3 distribution. Output lands in workspace/dr_previews/.
create_isaaclab_env scaffolds a FrankaPickCube task env wrapping the current Stage-3 DR scene. clone_envs(16) creates a 16-instance grid for PPO.
launch_training runs PPO for 20000 steps — enough to confirm training loop stability without a long run. checkpoint_training saves a snapshot tagged 'stage3_baseline'.

motion_controllers: none — this canonical does NOT use setup_pick_place_controller or any motion planner. The DR setup is pre-training, not a live pick-place canonical. motion_controllers.untested list is empty (no arm motion in this workflow).
BLOCKER: IsaacLab must be installed for create_isaaclab_env / launch_training. Everything up to and including preview_dr can be verified without IsaacLab.

Distinct from CP-NEW-parallel-env-scaling-32 (which benchmarks throughput on a fixed env) and CP-NEW-eureka-pick-place-reward (which iterates reward functions). This canonical is about DR curriculum authoring and multi-stage distribution management.
code:
# ── Minimal scene skeleton ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# ── Robot + table ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.6, 0.6, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[1, 0, 0, 0],
)

# ── Source bin + single training cube ────────────────────────────────────────
create_bin(
    prim_path="/World/SourceBin",
    size=[0.30, 0.30, 0.15],
    position=[0, 0.38, 0.825],
)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0.38, 0.90], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", schema_name=api)

create_bin(
    prim_path="/World/TargetBin",
    size=[0.30, 0.30, 0.15],
    position=[0, -0.38, 0.825],
)

# ── Stage 1: FIXED SCENE — no DR ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# Baseline: verify pick-place task is feasible without any randomization.
# No add_domain_randomizer calls at this stage.

# ── Stage 2: LIGHTING + COLOR DR ────────────────────────────────────────────
# Step A: query recommended ranges for the task
_dr_suggestions = suggest_dr_ranges(
    task_type="pick_and_place",
    robot="Franka Panda",
)
# Step B: load 'indoor_industrial' preset as parameter base
_preset = apply_dr_preset(preset="indoor_industrial")

# Step C: add lighting randomizer — varies DomeLight intensity
add_domain_randomizer(
    target="/World/DomeLight",
    randomizer_type="lighting",
    params={"intensity_min": 400.0, "intensity_max": 2000.0},
)

# Step D: add color randomizer on cube(s)
add_domain_randomizer(
    target="/World/Cube_.*",
    randomizer_type="color",
    params={"color_min": [0.1, 0.1, 0.1], "color_max": [0.9, 0.9, 0.9]},
)

# ── Validate Stage 2 distribution ────────────────────────────────────────────
_stage2_report = analyze_randomization(num_samples=30)
# Expected: all active axes (intensity, color_r/g/b) have std > 0

# ── Stage 3: FULL DR (texture + pose jitter) ──────────────────────────────────
# Add texture randomizer (UV-mapped material swap)
add_domain_randomizer(
    target="/World/Cube_.*",
    randomizer_type="texture",
    params={},
)

# Add pose jitter to cube — small random XY offset and Z rotation
add_domain_randomizer(
    target="/World/Cube_.*",
    randomizer_type="pose",
    params={"min_angle": -0.3, "max_angle": 0.3, "surface_prim": "/World/SourceBin"},
)

# ── Validate Stage 3 distribution ────────────────────────────────────────────
_stage3_report = analyze_randomization(num_samples=30)
# All 4 active axes (intensity, color, texture, pose) must have std > 0

# ── Visual sanity check ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
preview_dr(
    num_samples=9,
    output_dir="workspace/dr_previews/dr_curriculum_stage3",
    resolution=[512, 512],
)

# ── Scaffold IsaacLab env for Stage-3 DR scene ────────────────────────────────
create_isaaclab_env(
    task_name="FrankaPickCubeDR",
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    task_type="pick_and_place",
    num_envs=16,
    env_spacing=2.5,
    reward_terms=["reach_target", "grasp_success", "action_penalty"],
)

# ── Clone 16 environments for PPO training ───────────────────────────────────
clone_envs(
    source_path="/World/envs/env_0",
    num_envs=16,
    spacing=2.5,
    collision_filter=True,
)

# ── Launch PPO training run ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
launch_training(
    task="FrankaPickCubeDR",
    algo="ppo",
    num_steps=20000,
    num_envs=16,
    checkpoint_dir="workspace/rl_checkpoints/FrankaPickCubeDR",
)

# ── Save stage-3 baseline checkpoint ─────────────────────────────────────────
checkpoint_training(
    run_id="FrankaPickCubeDR",
    include_replay_buffer=False,
    tag="stage3_baseline",
)
verified_status: drafted-2026-05-16; form-gate-schema ✓; function-gate BLOCKED (requires IsaacLab install + omni.replicator DR runtime; DR authoring stages 1-3 + preview_dr can be smoke-tested without IsaacLab); patched-r-a20-fix
failure_modes: suggest_dr_ranges: task_type must be recognized — 'pick_and_place' is a known alias; use 'manipulation' as fallback if rejected
apply_dr_preset: preset='indoor_industrial' must be in the bundled preset registry; if not, use preset='warehouse' as fallback
add_domain_randomizer type='texture': requires OmniPBR materials to be present on cube prims; plain DisplayColor cubes may silently no-op the texture randomizer

add_domain_randomizer type='pose' with surface_prim: surface_prim must be a mesh with a valid WorldBoundingBox; SourceBin walls may cause jitter to push cube outside bin walls — reduce max_angle to 0.15 if cubes escape

analyze_randomization std==0 on 'color' axis: may occur if the color randomizer node was added but omni.replicator.core graph was not triggered (no sim.step before analyze) — call sim_control(action='step') before analyze_randomization
preview_dr: output_dir must be writable; 'workspace/dr_previews/' is gitignored by default but may not exist — handler should mkdir -p, but if not, create it manually before calling
create_isaaclab_env: IsaacLab must be installed; task_type='pick_and_place' must map to a known template in the running IsaacLab version (confirmed for IsaacLab >= 1.0.0)
clone_envs source_path /World/envs/env_0: create_isaaclab_env must create this path as a side-effect; if it does not, manually create_prim at that path before clone_envs
launch_training with 16 envs: requires ~2 GB free VRAM minimum; on a headless server launch_training may fail if Kit is not running — handler should surface a clear error
checkpoint_training: run_id 'FrankaPickCubeDR' must match exactly what launch_training registered; if launch_training uses a different internal ID the checkpoint will target the wrong run
extension_notes: Third rl-training canonical (after CP-NEW-parallel-env-scaling-32 and CP-NEW-eureka-pick-place-reward). Distinctive: ONLY canonical that exercises multi-stage DR curriculum authoring (suggest→preset→add×3→analyze×2→preview) as a first-class workflow. CP-NEW-parallel-env-scaling-32 uses a fixed env for throughput benchmarking; CP-NEW-eureka-pick-place-reward iterates reward terms; this canonical manages the training-data distribution via progressive DR stages. Also first canonical to use suggest_dr_ranges + apply_dr_preset together.
code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.6, 0.6, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

create_bin(
    prim_path={{source_bin.path}},
    size={{source_bin.size}},
    position={{source_bin.position}},
)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[0].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name=api)

create_bin(
    prim_path={{target_bin.path}},
    size={{target_bin.size}},
    position={{target_bin.position}},
)

_dr_suggestions = suggest_dr_ranges(
    task_type="pick_and_place",
    robot="Franka Panda",
)
_preset = apply_dr_preset(preset="indoor_industrial")

add_domain_randomizer(
    target="/World/DomeLight",
    randomizer_type="lighting",
    params={"intensity_min": 400.0, "intensity_max": 2000.0},
)
add_domain_randomizer(
    target="/World/Cube_.*",
    randomizer_type="color",
    params={"color_min": [0.1, 0.1, 0.1], "color_max": [0.9, 0.9, 0.9]},
)
_stage2_report = analyze_randomization(num_samples=30)

add_domain_randomizer(
    target="/World/Cube_.*",
    randomizer_type="texture",
    params={},
)
add_domain_randomizer(
    target="/World/Cube_.*",
    randomizer_type="pose",
    params={"min_angle": -0.3, "max_angle": 0.3, "surface_prim": {{source_bin.path}}},
)
_stage3_report = analyze_randomization(num_samples=30)

preview_dr(
    num_samples=9,
    output_dir="workspace/dr_previews/dr_curriculum_stage3",
    resolution=[512, 512],
)

create_isaaclab_env(
    task_name="FrankaPickCubeDR",
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    task_type="pick_and_place",
    num_envs=16,
    env_spacing=2.5,
    reward_terms=["reach_target", "grasp_success", "action_penalty"],
)

clone_envs(
    source_path="/World/envs/env_0",
    num_envs=16,
    spacing=2.5,
    collision_filter=True,
)

launch_training(
    task="FrankaPickCubeDR",
    algo="ppo",
    num_steps=20000,
    num_envs=16,
    checkpoint_dir="workspace/rl_checkpoints/FrankaPickCubeDR",
)

checkpoint_training(
    run_id="FrankaPickCubeDR",
    include_replay_buffer=False,
    tag="stage3_baseline",
)
